title: lippia alnifolia
intro: Lippia alnifolia, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican lippia, is a flowering plant in the verbena family that is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lippia alnifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from its leaves and flowers.
